world.description: Deadline: 23-Jun-2026 The Hadrian Trust provides small grants to charitable and social welfare organisations operating in North East England, including Northumberland, Durham, Tyne and Wear, and surrounding areas. Grants typically range from £500 to £2,000 and support projects addressing social welfare, homelessness, youth development, disability inclusion, and community wellbeing.
